content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward methods (ICM and RND) can be repurposed as an active selection metric for SOTA 2024-2025 episodic memory agents, where curiosity signals prioritize storing only surprising, under-predicted transitions rather than archiving all agent experience. This creates a self-subsizing memory system where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity naturally curates its own memory buffer to boost downstream planning efficiency.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
